Interface IRasterTypeDataSourceHandlerParameters2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters to raster type data source handler.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("2127D1AE-1E6F-4B55-8295-EC0D343E5893")]
public interface IRasterTypeDataSourceHandlerParameters2 : IRasterTypeDataSourceHandlerParameters

Properties

AllowAncillaryDatasets 

bool AllowAncillaryDatasets { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

AllowBuilderItems

Indicates whether sensor raster types are used in the attempt to load the data source.

bool AllowBuilderItems { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

AllowQuickOpen

Indicates whether an applicable data source (like a mosaic dataset item) loads with only basic information. Preventing it from connecting to pixel data (referenced by the underlying rasters in the function stack) can substantially improve performance of IRaste

bool AllowQuickOpen { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

AllowRasterDatasets

Indicates whether an attempt is made to load the data source as a non-sensor-dataset: i.e., a regular raster dataset, a mosaic dataset or a raster catalog item, a web service or image service item URL.

bool AllowRasterDatasets { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

DataSource 

object DataSource { get; set; }

Property Value

object

RasterTypeParameters

Override parameters injected into the raster types while contructing a function raster dataset from a data source.

IPropertySet RasterTypeParameters { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

IArray RasterTypes { get; set; }

IArray

bool StopAtFirstFind { get; set; }

bool

bool TryQuickCheckOnly { get; set; }
